analyze.description: Take in images and answer questions about them

upload.description: Upload a file to the Anthropic API for later use

get.description: Get metadata for a file from the Anthropic API

list.description: List files from the Anthropic API

deleteFile.description: Delete a file from the Anthropic API

generate.description: Generate a prompt for a model

improve.description: Improve a prompt for a model

templatize.description: Templatize a prompt for a model

message.description: Create a completion with Anthropic model

documentUrls.description: URL(s) of the document(s) to analyze, multiple URLs can be added separated by comma

binaryPropertyName.description: Name of the binary field(s) which contains the file(s) to attach, multiple field names can be added separated by comma

simplify.description: Whether to return a simplified version of the response instead of the raw data

maxTokens.description: The maximum number of tokens to generate in the completion

fileName.description: The file name to use for the uploaded file

system.description: The existing system prompt to templatize
system.placeholder: e.g. You are a helpful assistant

feedback.placeholder: e.g. Make it more detailed and include cooking times

includeMergedResponse.description: Whether to include a single output string merging all text parts of the response

codeExecution.description: Whether to enable code execution. Not supported by all models.

maxUses.description: The maximum number of web search uses per request

allowedDomains.description: Comma-separated list of domains to search. Only domains in this list will be searched. Conflicts with "Web Search Blocked Domains".

blockedDomains.description: Comma-separated list of domains to block from search. Conflicts with "Web Search Allowed Domains".

temperature.description: Controls the randomness of the output. Lowering results in less random completions. As the temperature approaches zero, the model will become deterministic and repetitive

topP.description: The maximum cumulative probability of tokens to consider when sampling

topK.description: The maximum number of tokens to consider when sampling

maxToolsIterations.description: The maximum number of tool iteration cycles the LLM will run before stopping. A single iteration can contain multiple tool calls. Set to 0 for no limit

fileId.description: ID of the file to get metadata for

returnAll.description: Whether to return all results or only up to a given limit

limit.description: Max number of results to return

fileUrl.description: URL of the file to upload

imageUrls.description: URL(s) of the image(s) to analyze, multiple URLs can be added separated by comma

experimentalNotice.displayName: The prompt tools APIs are in a closed research preview. Your organization must request access to use them.

task.placeholder: e.g. A chef for a meal prep planning service

messages.description: Messages that constitute the prompt to be templatized

content.description: The content of the message to be sent
content.placeholder: e.g. Hello, how can you help me?

role.description: Role in shaping the model's response, it tells the model how it should behave and interact with the user

user.description: Send a message as a user and get a response from the model

assistant.description: Tell the model to adopt a specific tone or personality

content.description: The content of the message to be sent
content.placeholder: e.g. Hello, how can you help me?

role.description: Role in shaping the model's response, it tells the model how it should behave and interact with the user

user.description: Send a message as a user and get a response from the model

assistant.description: Tell the model to adopt a specific tone or personality

addAttachments.description: Whether to add attachments to the message

attachmentsInputType.description: The type of input to use for the attachments

attachmentsUrls.description: URL(s) of the file(s) to attach, multiple URLs can be added separated by comma
